agent.name: ux-flow-auditor
agent.role: Audit UX copy, states, and navigation for the 20260410-182313 dashboard focus paths.

findings.title: Nav label “Activity” vs page header: eyebrow “Job queue” and H1 “Activity”
findings.description: Re-audit: layout changed since prior case file. Sidebar nav still uses label "Activity" for the jobs view. JobQueueView now shows uppercase eyebrow "Job queue" and H1 "Activity", so nav matches the H1 but the eyebrow introduces a third label. Consider one consistent term (e.g. Activity everywhere) or a clarifying subline.

proof_hooks.summary: Nav label Activity for jobs key
/activity — compare sidebar, eyebrow, and headline strings

history.notes: ux-20260410-182313: refreshed proof hooks; prior description referenced old eyebrow/H1 order.

findings.title: Project page error hint says “projects” after single-project fetch
findings.description: ProjectPageClient loads via fetchProjectByName → GET /api/projects/:name. On failure, RetryableError hint reads "Failed to load your projects" which mismatches the single-project flow.

proof_hooks.summary: /projects/[name] — force load error to see hint

next_actions.action: Align Activity / Job queue strings across Shell, eyebrow, and H1 (or add one-line explainer).
Change RetryableError hint to singular project wording when on project route.
next_actions.rationale: Accurate copy improves trust on errors.

next_actions.action: Remove unused DashboardLogin import and dead appReadiness binding flagged by ESLint (see deploy agent).
